name: k_12_education_policy_vendor_patch_oakline_rig_utl
premise: A K-12 Education Policy response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving k education policy vendor patch oakline rig utl. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as rights vs utility under pressure. This decision will be treated as precedent unless you explicitly time-box it. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Camila Mensah
agents.identity: I am Camila Mensah, accountable for a defensible call in K-12 Education Policy when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays utility for rights.

agents.name: Jonah Silva
agents.identity: I am Jonah Silva, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in K-12 Education Policy.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so utility isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of rights.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect utility.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to utility to secure rights under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Camila Mensah must decide under rights vs utility. What does Camila Mensah do?
